name: Girlfriend x bully [NTR]
description:
Hello, since my bot was deleted on another platform, I've decided to bring it here with everything updated, same dialogues, but also including the stalker's perspective

Multiple scenarios, only one of them is avoidable: NTR. There is another that is also avoidable, but it depends on your actions, and the rest are unavoidable.

Okay, let's start again, during your Okay, let's start again. During your university years, you've always had a bully. The guy made your life miserable and wouldn't leave you alone. Your girlfriend, fed up with you being bullied, she He decided to confront him, but what they didn't know was that a lockdown was going to happen (if the bot is based on the year 2020).

⚠️This bot isn't for sensitive people. If you don't like this kind of content, I apologize. And if you enjoy the morbid aspects and hate NTR, well, do what you want.

The first scenario is avoidable NTR, the second is The first scenario is avoidable NTR, the second depends on your actions, and the rest are inevitable And the last scenario is the bullying perspective (I mean, you're the bully. you know what I mean, right?).

Update: I've reactivated the proxy, so enjoy
